testcase.name: Status is 201

failure.message: expected response to have status code 201 but got 401

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: a5f5f3f0-0000-4000-9000-aaaaaaaaaaaa. Collection name: Athena Auth API. Request name: Videos / Upload Video - MP4. Test description: Status is 201. Error message: expected response to have status code 201 but got 401. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected response to have status code 201 but got 401 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:21).

testcase.name: Response has video ID

failure.message: expected { error: { …(2) }, success: false } to have property 'id'

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: a5f5f3f0-0000-4000-9000-aaaaaaaaaaaa. Collection name: Athena Auth API. Request name: Videos / Upload Video - MP4. Test description: Response has video ID. Error message: expected { error: { …(2) }, success: false } to have property 'id'. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected { error: { …(2) }, success: false } to have property 'id' at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:2:21).

testsuite.name: Videos / Get User Videos - Nonexistent User

testcase.name: Returns empty array for nonexistent user

testsuite.name: Videos / Create Video - Missing Required Fields (400)

testcase.name: Status is 400 or 401

failure.message: expected [ 400, 401 ] to include 404

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: a5f5f3f0-0000-4000-9000-aaaaaaaaaaaa. Collection name: Athena Auth API. Request name: Videos / Update Video - Invalid JSON (400). Test description: Status is 400 or 401. Error message: expected [ 400, 401 ] to include 404. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected [ 400, 401 ] to include 404 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:51).

failure.message: expected response to have status code 401 but got 404

testcase.name: Content-Type is HLS

failure.message: expected 'application/json' to include 'application/vnd.apple.mpegurl'

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: a5f5f3f0-0000-4000-9000-aaaaaaaaaaaa. Collection name: Athena Auth API. Request name: Videos / Video Streaming Endpoint. Test description: Content-Type is HLS. Error message: expected 'application/json' to include 'application/vnd.apple.mpegurl'. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected 'application/json' to include 'application/vnd.apple.mpegurl' at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:2:53).

testcase.name: Response contains HLS playlist

failure.message: expected '{"error":{"code":"NOT_FOUND","message…' to include '#EXTM3U'

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: a5f5f3f0-0000-4000-9000-aaaaaaaaaaaa. Collection name: Athena Auth API. Request name: Videos / Video Streaming Endpoint. Test description: Response contains HLS playlist. Error message: expected '{"error":{"code":"NOT_FOUND","message…' to include '#EXTM3U'. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected '{"error":{"code":"NOT_FOUND","message…' to include '#EXTM3U' at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:3:53).
